LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DANIEL LEVIN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS -- ADVANCE ON ATTORNEY FEES GRANTED IN PART. $100,000 WILL BE PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S TRUST ACCOUNT AS AN ADVANCE ON PLAINTIFF'S COMMUNITY PROPERTY WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO EITHER SIDE SEEKING FURTHER RELIEF AS APPROPRIATE FOLLOWING FURTHER DEVELOPMENTS IN THE CASE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED A STAY FOR EXECUTION OF ORDER UNTIL NOON ON FRIDAY, 10/24/03. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR BOND WAS DENIED. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558.

MOTION For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Annie Thorkelson, Esq., 861-1736, for plaintiff Deniel Levin, moving for attorneys' fees and costs
Peter J. Lynn, Esq. and Christine A. Huntoon, Esq. of MURPHY, PEARSON 788-1900, for defendant and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- PLAINTIFF DANIEL LEVIN'S MOTION For Attorneys' Fees And Costs -- Advance on attorney fees granted in part. $100,000 will be payable to plaintiff's trust account as an advance on plaintiff's community property without prejudice to either side seeking further relief as appropriate following further developments in the case. The Court further ordered a stay for execution of order until noon on Friday, 10/24/03. Plaintiff's request for bond was denied. Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
